testcase.name: run
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: session not created: Chrome instance exited. Examine ChromeDriver verbose log to determine the cause. Host info: host: 'SHARATHVIRAT', ip: '169.254.142.254' Build info: version: '4.23.0', revision: '4df0a231af' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version:
